column4: specific eligibility reversal for {Psyche!}/her ability; fails transfer — teaches nothing about ash-heap retrieval beyond this one exception
confirms she is not Laibon for Orun/Aye placement; fails non-obviousness — ordinary clan-restriction logic a fluent judge already knows
this card's own numeric capacity-threshold/counter mechanic ({Call the Great Beast}); fails transfer — no other card shares the formula
plain reading of "when she is in combat" as herself, not another minion; fails non-obviousness
!DROPPED:3.2 stealth is the ability's payload, but locked+torpor usability already fills the 3-code cap
specific carve-out naming one card ({Blood Hunt}); fails transfer to other cards
confirms one specific card combo functions as printed ({Trap} + presses); fails transfer
plain reading that the ability is conditioned on his own act of bleeding; fails non-obviousness

procedural token-tracking suggestion for this card's own multi-turn requirement; fails transfer, and "if players agree" marks it non-normative anyway
states her specific merged identity/title; fails transfer — the general merge-changes-sect-and-burns-token principle is already carried by the sibling template rulings (eg. R2322)
this card's own counter-granting trigger condition (consecutive-round hand damage); fails transfer
specific card-interaction exclusion ({The Unmasking} + her); fails transfer beyond this pair
!WORDING calls its own timing "as an action modifier" yet usable after block attempts conclude, which is not typical action-modifier timing — flag for check against card text
